summary: Iteration 142: Custom tier support and tier stack validation complete. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (Revenue/Operations/Risk/Compliance/Market) load correctly with rebuilt UX. Tier stack verified: Free → Foundation → Performance → SMB Protect → Custom with no Growth label and Super Admin not exposed client-facing.

issues: 'Growth' plan name still visible in PLANS array for 'growth' id - this is intentional per user spec as 'SMB Protect' is shown on the pricing cards

critical_code_review_comments: tier_resolver.py BRAIN_PLAN_LABELS correctly maps: free→Free, starter→Foundation, professional→Performance, enterprise→SMB Protect, custom→Custom, super_admin→Custom
pricingTiers.js correctly defines tier order with SMB Protect ($3,900) before Custom (Contact Sales)
business_brain_engine.py correctly uses tier_resolver for custom tier support with 100 KPI limit
Rebuilt pages (Revenue/Operations/Risk/Compliance/Market) all render with new SurfacePrimitives components
Explainability strips and action ownership cards visible on Revenue/Operations/Risk pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 142 validated custom tier support and tier stack changes. Backend tier_resolver.py and business_brain_engine.py correctly support custom tier with 100 KPI limit. Pricing pages show correct tier stack: Free → Foundation → Performance → SMB Protect → Custom. Super Admin resolves to 'Custom' label (not exposed client-facing). All rebuilt pages (Revenue, Operations, Risk, Compliance, Market) load correctly with new UX components.
